premise: A night-shift clerk discovers the office basement is a procedural dungeon.
outline: 1. NARRATOR opens in the basement stairwell. 2. SYSTEM assigns a survival quest. 3. HERO finds a cursed stapler. 4. SIDEKICK calls from the elevator speaker. 5. BOSS interrupts with a policy violation. 6. Cliffhanger: the break room becomes Floor Two.
script: <NARRATOR>The basement stairs went down farther than the building was tall.</NARRATOR><SYSTEM style="hostile announcer">NEW QUEST: Survive onboarding. Reward: one cursed stapler and dental coverage of unknown origin.</SYSTEM><HERO>I knew unpaid overtime was a trap, but this feels legally distinct.</HERO><SIDEKICK>The elevator says you are now an essential employee. That seems bad.</SIDEKICK><BOSS>Violation detected: unauthorized courage.</BOSS><SYSTEM>CLIFFHANGER: The break room has unlocked Floor Two.</SYSTEM>
